name: Shelterluv Animal Shelter Management API
what_it_does: Shelterluv REST API for animal shelter and rescue organization management platform. Enables AI agents to manage animal intake and records, handle adoption workflows and applications, track foster placements and returns, manage donor and volunteer records, process adoption payments and fees, access shelter statistics and outcome data, and integrate shelter data with websites and adoption listing platforms.
use_cases: Managing animal intake and medical records from shelter operations agents
Processing adoption applications and outcomes from adoption workflow agents
Tracking foster placements and communicating with foster families from rescue coordination agents
Retrieving shelter statistics and outcome data from animal welfare reporting agents
not_for: Veterinary clinical practices without animal shelter intake workflows
Pet retail without rescue and adoption lifecycle management
Commercial breeding operations without shelter management focus
best_when: An animal shelter, humane society, or rescue organization using Shelterluv wants AI agents to automate animal intake processing, adoption workflow management, foster coordination, and donor communication.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Adopter and donor personal data requires careful handling. Animal medical records have varying shelter-specific privacy considerations. Donor giving data requires stewardship.

auth.notes: Shelterluv uses API key authentication. Shelter-level credentials via X-SHELTERLUV-API-KEY header. API keys grant full shelter data access. Available to all Shelterluv subscribers.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan for small rescues; API access on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Flat monthly pricing based on size — affordable for nonprofits
pricing.notes: Nonprofit-friendly pricing. Used by 3,000+ shelters and rescues in the US. Integrates with Petfinder and Adopt-a-Pet for adoption listings. Strong community among animal welfare organizations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; avoid aggressive polling

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Adopter and donor personal data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key header
No granular scopes — API key grants full shelter data access
Nonprofit animal welfare context — treat data with appropriate sensitivity
Petfinder/Adopt-a-Pet integration is separate from Shelterluv API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Adopter and donor personal data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Nonprofit animal welfare platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Adopter, donor, and animal data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
